news.headline: Israel, Finland qualify for Eurovision final as five countries boycott music contest

news.headline: Iran warns US to accept peace plan or risk collapse of Middle East truce

news.headline: Air India crisis deepens ahead of final Ahmedabad crash report
news.summary: Air India faces a leadership vacuum and mounting financial losses as it struggles to recover from the crash.
